message:
test(B10): wave 75 — derive-trait coverage for supervision, remote, crashpack

19 tests: SupervisionStrategy, RestartPolicy, EscalationPolicy,
NameCollisionPolicy, StartTieBreak, RemoteTaskId, IdempotencyKey,
LeaseState, SagaState, RemoteTaskState, RemoteError, CrashPackConfig,
FailureOutcome, AttachmentKind, ManifestValidationError,
EvidenceEntrySnapshot, SupervisionSnapshot, ManifestAttachment,
CrashPackManifest.
